templates.name: 01 - Basic Variables
templates.author: sherstep
templates.templateContent:
## Create VLANs ##

vlan 100
name Management

vlan 200
name Staff

vlan 300
name Data



## Configure SVIs and Interfaces ##

interface Vlan100
description ${Description}-SVI
ip address $Mgmt_VLAN_IP 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan200
description Staff
ip address $Staff_VLAN_IP 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan300
description Data
ip address $Data_VLAN_IP 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2


interface gig1/0/$access_port
description Staff port
switchport access vlan 200
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root


## Configure AAA Settings ##

tacacs server ISE-01
 address ipv4 10.10.0.100
 key Cisco123
tacacs server ISE-02
 address ipv4 10.10.0.200
 key Cisco123

aaa group server tacacs+ TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
 server name ISE-01
 server name ISE-02

aaa authentication login default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local
aaa authentication enable default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP enable
aaa authorization exec default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa authorization commands 15 default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa accounting exec default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
aaa accounting commands 15 default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
username cisco privilege 15 secret Cisco123
 

## Configure Access Lists ##

access-list 101 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 host 50.0.0.10
access-list 102 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 50.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 103 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 20.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 104 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 any
access-list 105 permit tcp any any eq www
access-list 106 permit tcp any any eq telnet
access-list 107 permit tcp any any eq smtp
access-list 108 permit tcp any any eq pop3
access-list 109 permit tcp any any eq 21
access-list 110 permit tcp any any eq 20

templates.name: 09 - Implicit Variables - Configure Access and Trunk Ports
templates.author: sherstep
templates.templateContent:
## Apply configs to existing access and trunk ports using system variables, regardless of interface speed or device ##

#foreach ($interface in ${__interface})
#if ($interface.portName.contains("Bluetooth") || $interface.portName.contains("AppGig") || $interface.portName.contains("Port-channel") || $interface.portName.contains("GigabitEthernet0")) 
#elseif ($interface.interfaceType == "Physical" && $interface.portMode == "access")

interface $interface.portName
## switchport mode access --> this command would have already been run to designate the port as an access port ##
switchport voice vlan $VoiceVlan
spanning-tree portfast

templates.name: 11 - Implicit Variables Example - One-Two Punch
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Use Template 1 as a day-0 or day-n template to prepopulate description and access/trunk for new switch ##
## Use Template 2 as a day-n template to push configs based on description ##
## Can use interface range command, but be aware of 8 range limitation per command ##
## Can also use for-each loop for a long range consecutive ports ##

TEMPLATE #1 

interface range gi1/0/1-10,13,15,20-22
description Camera Interfaces
switchport mode access

interface range gi1/0/11-12,14,16-19
description Access Point Interfaces
switchport mode access

interface range TenGig1/1/3-4,Twenty1/1/1-2
description Uplink Ports
switchport mode trunk

TEMPLATE #2

#foreach ($interface in ${__interface})
#if ($interface.description.contains("Camera")) 
    interface $interface.portName
    description These are IP Camera Ports
    switchport mode access
    switchport access vlan 100

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("Access Point"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description These are AP ports
    switchport mode access
    switchport access vlan 200

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("Uplink"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description This is the Uplink port
    switchport mode trunk
    switchport trunk allowed vlan add 200,300,500

#else
#end 
#end

templates.name: 00 - Pure CLI
templates.author: sherstep
templates.templateContent:
## Create VLANs ##
vlan 100
name Management

vlan 200
name Staff

vlan 300
name Voice

## Configure SVIs and Interfaces ##

interface Vlan100
description Management
ip address 192.168.10.10 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan200
description Staff
ip address 192.168.20.10 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2


interface Vlan300
description Staff
ip address 192.168.30.10 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2


interface gig1/0/10
description Staff port
switchport mode access
switchport access vlan 200
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root


## Configure AAA Settings ##
tacacs server ISE-01
 address ipv4 10.10.0.100
 key Cisco123
tacacs server ISE-02
 address ipv4 10.10.0.200
 key Cisco123

aaa group server tacacs+ TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
 server name ISE-01
 server name ISE-02

aaa authentication login default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local
aaa authentication enable default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP enable
aaa authorization exec default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa authorization commands 15 default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa accounting exec default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
aaa accounting commands 15 default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
username cisco privilege 15 secret Cisco123

## Configure Access Lists ##

access-list 101 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 host 50.0.0.10
access-list 102 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 50.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 103 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 20.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 104 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 any
access-list 105 permit tcp any any eq www
access-list 106 permit tcp any any eq telnet
access-list 107 permit tcp any any eq smtp
access-list 108 permit tcp any any eq pop3
access-list 109 permit tcp any any eq 21
access-list 110 permit tcp any any eq 20

templates.name: 16 - EEM Script Example
templates.author: sherstep
templates.templateContent:
##EEM script that allows bouncing of main uplink##

event manager applet REBOOT_INTERFACE
event none maxrun 120
action 1.0 cli command "enable"
action 2.0 cli command "configure terminal"
action 3.0 cli command "interface GigabitEthernet0/0"
action 3.1 cli command "shutdown"
action 3.2 cli command "interface Ten1/1/4"
action 3.3 cli command "shutdown"
action 4.0 syslog msg "Starting shutdown timer, waiting 10 seconds..."
action 4.1 wait 20
action 4.2 syslog msg "Ending shutdown timer after 10 seconds..."
action 5.0 cli command "interface GigabitEthernet0/0"
action 5.1 cli command "no shutdown"
action 5.2 cli command "interface Ten1/1/4"
action 5.3 cli command "no shutdown"
action 6.0 syslog msg "Starting no shut timer, waiting 20 seconds..."
action 6.1 wait 20
action 6.2 syslog msg "Ending no shut timer after 20 seconds..."
action 6.3 syslog msg "Wait completed successfully!"
action 7.0 cli command "end"

#MODE_ENABLE
event manager run REBOOT_INTERFACE
#MODE_END_ENABLE

##Deletes EEM script after it has finished running  ##
no event manager applet REBOOT_INTERFACE

#else
#end

 server name ISE-02

aaa authorization exec default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa authorization commands 15 default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa accounting exec default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP

access-list 106 permit tcp any any eq telnet
access-list 107 permit tcp any any eq smtp
access-list 108 permit tcp any any eq pop3

access-list 110 permit tcp any any eq 20
